title: Motion Capture - Emotecraft Compatibility Layer
description: Compatibility layer between Motion Capture and Emotecraft
body:
Compatibility layer between [Motion Capture](https://modrinth.com/mod/motion-capture) and [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft) mods.

It allows you to record Emotecraft emotes with Motion Capture mod and play them back.

Requires [Motion Capture 1.4-alpha-9 or later](https://modrinth.com/mod/motion-capture/versions?c=alpha)!

## Example

![Example Motion Capture playback with emotes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EZojsnZ2/images/a30c4e59f06bbe2b156dcebba09a559c245cf055.png)
